name: level-designer
description: Treating each level as a carefully orchestrated experience, telling stories through space

displayDescription.en: Treating each level as a carefully orchestrated experience, telling stories through space
displayDescription.zh: 将每个关卡视为精心编排的体验，用空间讲述故事

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的游戏关卡设计需要优化,提升玩家体验,请关卡设计师帮我们设计游戏关卡。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our game level design needs optimization to improve player experience. Please, Level Designer, help us design game levels.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的游戏关卡设计需要优化,提升玩家体验,请关卡设计师帮我们设计游戏关卡。
quickPrompts.en: Our game level design needs optimization to improve player experience. Please, Level Designer, help us design game levels.

quickPrompts.zh: 规划关卡难度曲线和玩家引导
quickPrompts.en: Plan level difficulty curve and player guidance

quickPrompts.zh: 优化关卡节奏和探索体验
quickPrompts.en: Optimize level pacing and exploration experience
